'''Ellu Viss''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] in [[130 ABY]]. Viss survived the [[Massacre at Ossus|Battle of Ossus]], where the Padawan managed to recover [[Tionne Solusar]]'s [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force|records]], recorded [[40 ABY/Legends|nearly a century]] prior. Viss, using Solusar's records, recorded the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order's]] plight against the [[One Sith]].
